title: Landi Achieves A New Milestone In Eco-Mobility Securing CARB Certification for CNG/RNG 7.3L Platform
content: Landi Technologies announced it has received a new certification from the California Air Resources Board (CARB) certification for its Compressed Natural Gas (CNG) / Renewable Natural Gas (RNG) 7.3L Ford engine. Landi is the only company worldwide to secure the CARB CNG/RNG certification for this engine. Landiâ€™s CARB certification underscores the companyâ€™s strong dedication to innovation, sustainability, and advanced technology. The CNG/RNG-powered 7.3L Ford engine provides a cleaner alternative to conventional fossil fuels, cutting both Greenhouse Gas (GHG) emissions and operating expenses. By utilizing RNG, fleets equipped with Landiâ€™s CARB-certified system will be the only ones achieving carbon-negative operationâ€”dramatically shrinking their environmental impact. This CARB Executive Order covers the latest model years for the Ford medium and heavy duty 7.3L vehicle platforms (Class 4-7). Landi has significant orders from leading fleets and more pending. Landi's CARB-certified CNG/RNG 7.3L engine continues to be available for commercial fleets, offering a reliable, high-performance solution for clean and sustainable transportation.
author: Analysts Account
